name: SLSA Provenance Defines Build Production Evidence Fields
statement: The SLSA Build Provenance v1.2 specification defines a provenance predicate for describing how software artifacts were produced, including a predicate type, build definition, run details, builder identity, and dependency-related fields.
quantitative_note: No quantitative estimate; this is a technical specification extraction.
caveats: This finding describes the SLSA provenance model and does not verify a specific release.
Using provenance fields in a release workflow requires separate source-backed evidence for the release, builder, and attestation.

domain_fields.control_signal: Required and recommended provenance fields for artifact production evidence
domain_fields.risk_interpretation: Supports a baseline control claim that release provenance evidence should identify how artifacts were produced and by which builder context
domain_fields.limitations: Does not establish operational execution for a concrete project
